_comment: Curated remaps for Docker images that were renamed/moved and now 404 on Docker Hub. Keys are the old repo (no tag, lowercase, library/ for official); values are the current repo. These are high-confidence, hand-verified substitutions (old 404s, new exists, same project). HomeDeck auto-substitutes the new image at install time but always shows a disclaimer so the user can verify. Images not listed here fall back to a best-effort Docker Hub name search.
